title: DRDO CEPTAM 11 Tier I Result 2026
short_information: Defence Research & Development Organisation DRDO has released the CEPTAM 2025 Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled DRDO Vacancy Can Download the Exam DRDO CEPTAM 11 Tier I Result 2026. Read the notification for DRDO CEPTAM 11 Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Defence Research & Development Organisation (DRDO) DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2025 DRDO Advt No. CEPTAM 11 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: STA B: General / OBC / EWS : 750/- SC / ST / PH / Female : 500/- Refund Fees : 500/- (After CBT Appear) Tech A: General / OBC / EWS : 600/- SC / ST / PH / Female : 500/- Refund Fees : 500/- (After CBT Appear) Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking DRDO CEPTAM 11
eligibility: Read the Notification. Technician – A (Tech A) 203 10th with ITI Certificate in Related Trade. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification. How to Fill DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment Online Form 2025 DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 11/12/2025 to 11/01/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. Interested Candidates Can Read the Full DRDO CEPTAM 11 Exam 2025 Notification Before Apply Online Download Mobile Apps for Latest Updates Android Apps Apple IOS Apps Some Useful
